Tour.homeNavDesc: Welcome to the FEPS Events Hub. Use this bar to navigate the site.
Tour.homeStatsContent: See the total number of active events and upcoming seminars at a glance.
Tour.homeFeedContent: Scroll through the most recent and highlighted upcoming events.
Tour.homeLangContent: Instantly switch the interface language between English, Arabic, and French.
Tour.eventsCalendarContent: Browse through the faculty's events visually month by month.
Tour.eventsSearchContent: Type keywords to quickly find specific events or seminars.
Tour.eventsFiltersContent: Filter the directory by specific event types like Workshops, Seminars, or Cultural events.
Tour.adminSidebarContent: Navigate between events management, reports, and user access controls.
Tour.adminCreateContent: Click here to add a new academic event, upload an agenda, and set locations.
Tour.adminPublishContent: Instantly publish a draft or unpublish an event from the public calendar with one click.
Tour.adminActionsContent: Use these tools to modify an event's details or remove it permanently from the system.
Tour.adminReportFiltersContent: Select the exact date range, event type, and status to include in your official report.
Tour.adminReportGenerateContent: Click here to render and download a formal, printable PDF document of the events ledger.

FAQ.title: Frequently Asked Questions
FAQ.subtitle: Answers to the most common questions about the faculty events system

faqs.q: What is the FEPS Events System?
faqs.a: It is the official system for managing and publishing academic events and activities at the Faculty of Economics and Political Science, Cairo University.

faqs.q: How do I follow upcoming events?
faqs.a: Browse the calendar page to view all published events, with the ability to navigate between months.
Adding events is only available to registered users with Editor, Manager, or Super Admin roles.

faqs.q: How do I get an account?
faqs.a: Accounts are created by the system administrator. Contact the faculty administration for access.

faqs.q: Does the system support multiple languages?
faqs.a: Yes, the system supports three languages: Arabic, English, and French. You can switch from the navigation bar.

sections.title: 1. Acceptance
sections.content: By using the FEPS Events System, you agree to be bound by these terms and conditions.

sections.title: 2. Permitted Use
sections.content: This system is designated for managing and publishing academic events and activities of the faculty. Any unauthorized or unlawful use is prohibited.

sections.title: 3. User Accounts
sections.content: User accounts are created by the system administrator. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your login credentials.

sections.title: 4. Content
sections.content: All events and content published on this system are subject to review by the faculty administration. The faculty reserves the right to modify or remove any content.

sections.title: 5. Disclaimer
sections.content: This system is provided "as is" without any express or implied warranties. The faculty is not liable for any damages resulting from the use of the system.

sections.title: 1. Data Collection
sections.content: We collect data necessary to provide academic services through the system. This includes your name, email, and role.

sections.title: 2. Data Usage
sections.content: Your data is used solely for the management of events and official communications of the faculty.

sections.title: 3. Data Protection
sections.content: We take appropriate security measures to protect your data against unauthorized access, alteration, or destruction.

sections.title: 4. Data Sharing
sections.content: We do not share your data with third parties except as required by law or with your explicit consent.

sections.title: 5. User Rights
sections.content: You have the right to request a copy of your data or its deletion at any time by contacting the system administrator.
